seoTitle: Claremont Meadows vs Clarence — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Claremont Meadows and Clarence. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Claremont Meadows vs Clarence: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Claremont Meadows and Clarence.
heading: Claremont Meadows vs Clarence — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Claremont Meadows, New South Wales and Clarence, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Clarence has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Claremont Meadows (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Claremont Meadows or Clarence safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Claremont Meadows has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Clarence scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Claremont Meadows scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Clarence scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Claremont Meadows or Clarence?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Clarence has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
